feature.name: Plugin registry and metaclass discovery
feature.description: Extract VibeShop plugin registration, metaclass discovery, and dispatch as a standalone package.
included_behaviors: register plugin instances and resolve them by name
auto-register plugin subclasses via PluginMeta into GLOBAL_STATE
discover plugin classes registered by metaclass
track plugin names in GLOBAL_STATE plugin_names list
excluded_behaviors: YAML bootstrap, pricing, CSV, and ORM modules
original project tests and CLI entrypoints

entanglement.description: Plugin resolution is split across registry, metaclass, and utils shortcuts with GLOBAL_STATE class and name bookkeeping.
signals: two similarly named plugin helpers with incorrect semantics
PluginMeta stores classes in GLOBAL_STATE plugin_classes
register appends names to GLOBAL_STATE plugin_names

output.import: from featurelifted import BasePlugin, PluginMeta, PluginRegistry; from featurelifted.state import GLOBAL_STATE, reset_state
